block.header: =N(" kwo mo yo mikwo moti pukusi mo yo mibukusi moti ko no woka ni na tumasu kwo ipye kikana norasane sworamitu yamatonokuni pa osinabete ware koso wore sikinabete ware koso mase ware koso pa norame ipye wo mo na wo mo ")
=N(" yamato ni pa murayama aredo toriyoropu amenokaguyama noboritati kunimi wo sureba kunipara pa keburi tatitatu unapara pa kamame tatitatu umasi kuni so akidusima yamatonokuni pa ")

=N(" yasumisisi wa go opokimi no asita ni pa torinadetamapi yupupye ni pa iyoritatasisi mitorasi no adusa no yumi no nakapazu no oto su nari asagari ni ima tatasu rasi yupugari ni ima tatasu rasi mitorasi no adusa no yumi no nakapazu no oto su nari ")
=N(" tamakiparu uti no oponwo ni uma namete asa pumasu ramu so no kusapukanwo ")

=N(" kasumi tatu nagaki parupi no kurenikyeru waduki mo sirazu murakimono kokoro wo itami nuyekwotori uranake woreba tamatasuki kake no yorosiku topotukamwi wa go opokimi no idemasi no yama kwosu kaze no pitori woru wa ga koromode ni asayopi ni kapyerapinureba masurawo to omopyeru ware mo kusamakura tabi ni si areba omopiyaru taduki wo sirani aminoura no amawotomyera ga yaku sipo no omopi so yakuru wa ga sitagokoro ")
=N(" yamagwosi no kaze wo tokizimi nuru ywo otizu ipye n aru imo wo kakete sinwopitu ")
=N(" aki no nwo no mikusa kari puki yadorerisi udi no miyakwo no karipo si omopoyu ")
=N(" nikitatu ni punanori semu to tukwi mateba sipo mo kanapinu ima pa kogiidena ")
=N(" xxx xxx wa ga sekwo ga itataserikyemu itukasi ga moto ")
=N(" kimi ga yo mo wa ga yo mo siru ya ipasiro no woka no kusane wo iza musubitena ")
=N(" wa ga sekwo pa karipo tukurasu kaya nakupa kwomatu ga sita no kusa wo karasane ")
=N(" wa ga porisi nwosima pa misetu soko pukaki agwone no ura no tama so piripanu ")
=N(" wa ga porisi kwosima pa misi wo soko pukaki agwone no ura no tama so piripanu ")
=N(" kaguyama pa unebi wowosi to miminasi to apiaraswopiki kamuyo ywori kaku ni aru rasi inisipye mo sika ni are koso utusemi mo tuma wo araswopu rasiki ")
=N(" kaguyama to miminasiyama to apisi toki tatite mi ni kosi inamikunipara ")
=N(" watatumi no toyopatakumo ni iripi misi koyopi no tukuywo sayani terikoso ")

=N(" puyugomori paru sarikureba nakazarisi tori mo kinakinu sakazarisi pana mo sakyeredo yama wo sigemi irite mo torazu kusa pukami torite mo mizu akiyama no konopa wo mite pa momiti woba torite so sinwopu awoki woba okite so nageku soko si uramyesi akiyama ware pa ")

=N(" umasake miwanoyama awoniyosi naranoyama no yama no ma ni ikakuru made miti no kuma itumoru madeni tubarani mo mitutu yukamu wo sibasiba mo misakemu yama wo kokoro naku kumo no kakusapu besi ya ")
=N(" miwayama wo sika mo kakusu ka kumo dani mo kokoroaranamo kakusapu besi ya ")
=N(" peswokata no payasi no saki no sanwopari no kinu ni tuku nasu me ni tuku wa ga se ")
=N(" akanesasu murasakinwo yuki simenwo yuki nwomori pa mizu ya kimi ga swode puru ")
=N(" murasakino nipopyeru imo wo nikuku araba pitoduma yuweni ware kwopwime ya mo ")
=N(" kapanope no yutuipamura ni kusa musazu tune ni moga mo na tokowotomye nite ")
=N(" utiswo wo womi no opokimi ama nare ya iragwonosima no tamamo karimasu ")
=N(" utusemino inoti wo wosimi nami ni nure iragwonosima no tamamo kariwosu ")

=N(" miyosinwo no mimiga no mine ni toki naku so yuki pa purikyeru manaku so ame pa purikyeru so no yuki no toki naki ga goto so no ame no manaki ga goto kuma mo otizu omopitutu so kosi so no yamamiti wo ")

=N(" miyosinwo no mimiga no yama ni tokiziku so yuki pa puru to pu manaku so ame pa puru to pu so no yuki no tokiziki ga goto so no ame no manaki ga goto kuma mo otizu omopitutu so kuru so no yamamiti wo ")
=N(" yoki pito no yosi to yoku mite yosi to ipisi yosinwo yoku miyo yoki pito yoku mi ")
=N(" paru sugwite natu kitaru rasi sirwotapeno koromo positari amenokaguyama ")

=N(" tamatasuki unebwinoyama no kasipara no piziri no miyo yu aremasisi kamwi no kotogoto tuganokwino iya tugitugini ame no sita sirasimyesisi wo sworanimitu yamato wo okite awoniyosi narayama wo kwoye ikasamani omoposimyese ka amazakaru pina ni pa aredo ipabasiru apuminokuni no sasanami no opotu no miya ni ame no sita sirasimyesikyemu sumyeroki no kamwi no mikoto no opomiya pa koko to kikedomo opotono pa koko to ipedomo parukusa no sigeku opwitaru kasumi tati parupi no kwireru momosikwino opomiyatokoro mireba kanasi mo ")

=N(" tamatasuki unebwinoyama no kasipara no piziri no miya yu aremasisi kamwi no kotogoto tuganokwino iya tugitugini ame no sita sirasimyesikyeru sworamitu yamato wo oki awoniyosi narayama kwoyete ikasamani omoposikyeme ka amazakaru pina ni pa aredo ipabasiru apuminokuni no sasanami no opotu no miya ni ame no sita sirasimyesikyemu sumyeroki no kamwi no mikoto no opomiya pa koko to kikedomo opotono pa koko to ipedomo kasumi tati parupi ka kwireru natukusa ka sigeku narinuru momosikwino opomiyatokoro mireba sabusi mo ")
=N(" sasanami no siga no karasaki sakiku aredo opomiyapito no pune matikanetu ")
=N(" sasanami no siga no opowada yodomu tomo mukasi no pito ni mata mo apame ya mo ")
=N(" sasanami no pira no opowada yodomu tomo mukasi no pito ni apamu to mope ya ")
=N(" inisipye no pito ni ware are ya sasanami no puruki miyakwo wo mireba kanasiki ")
=N(" sasanami no kuni tu mikamwi no urasabwite aretaru miyakwo mireba kanasi mo ")
=N(" siranamino pamamatu ga ye no tamukekusa ikuyo madeni ka tosi no penu ramu ")
=N(" siranamino pamamatu ga ye no tamukekusa ikuyo madeni ka tosi pa penikyemu ")
=N(" kore ya ko no yamato nisite pa a ga kwopuru kwidi ni ari to pu na ni opu senoyama ")

=N(" yasumisisi wa go opokimi no kikosimyesu ame no sita ni kuni pa si mo sapani aredomo yamakapa no kiywoki kaputi to mikokoro wo yosinwo no kuni no panatirapu akidu no nwopye ni miyabasira putwosikimaseba momosikwino opomiyapito pa pune namete asakapa watari punagipopi yupukapa wataru ko no kapa no tayuru koto naku ko no yama no iya takasirasu midu tagitu taki no miyakwo pa miredo akanu kamo ")
=N(" miredo akanu yosinwonokapa no tokonamye no tayuru koto naku mata kapyerimimu ")

=N(" yasumisisi wa go opokimi kamunagara kamusabwi sesu to yosinwogapa tagitu kaputi ni takatono wo takasirimasite noboritati kunimi wo seseba tatanaparu awokakiyama yamatumi no maturu mitukwi to parubye pa panakazasi moti aki tateba momiti kazaseri yukiswopu kapa no kamwi mo opomike ni tukapematuru to kami tu se ni ukapa wo tati simo tu se ni sade sasiwatasu yamakapa mo yorite tukapuru kamwi no miyo kamo ")

=N(" yasumisisi wa go opokimi kamunagara kamusabwi sesu to yosinwogapa tagitu kaputi ni takatono wo takasirimasite noboritati kunimi wo seseba tatanaparu awokakiyama yamatumi no maturu mitukwi to parubye pa panakazasi moti aki tateba momitiba kazasi yukiswopu kapa no kamwi mo opomike ni tukapematuru to kami tu se ni ukapa wo tati simo tu se ni sade sasiwatasu yamakapa mo yorite tukapuru kamwi no miyo kamo ")
=N(" yamakapa mo yorite tukapuru kamunagara tagitu kaputi ni punade sesu kamo ")
=N(" aminoura ni punanori su ramu wotomyera ga tamamo no suswo ni sipo mitu ramu ka ")
=N(" kusirotuku tapusinosaki ni kyepu mo ka mo opomiyapito no tamamo karu ramu ")
=N(" siposawi ni iragwonosimabye kogu pune ni imo noru ramu ka araki simamwi wo ")
=N(" wa ga sekwo pa iduku yuku ramu okutumono nabari no yama wo kyepu ka kwoyu ramu ")
=N(" wagimokwo wo izami no yama wo takami ka mo yamato no miyenu kuni topomi ka mo ")

=N(" yasumisisi wa go opokimi takaterasu pinomikwo kamunagara kamusabwi sesu to putwosikasu miyakwo wo okite komorikuno patusenoyama pa makwi tatu araki yamadi wo ipa ga ne sapekwi osinabe sakatorino asa kwoyemasite tama kagiru yupu sarikureba miyuki puru akwinooponwo ni patasusuki sino wo osinabe kusamakura tabiyadori sesu inisipye omopite ")
=N(" akwinonwo ni yadoru tabipito utinabiki i mo nu rame ya mo inisipye omopu ni ")
=N(" makusa karu aranwo ni pa aredo momitiba no sugwinisi kimi ga katami to so kosi ")
=N(" pimugasi no nwo ni kagirwopwi no tatu miyete kapyerimi sureba tukwi katabukinu ")
=N(" pinamisi no mikwo no mikoto no uma namete mikari tatasisi toki pa kimukapu ")

=N(" yasumisisi wa go opokimi takaterasu pinomikwo aratape no pudipara ga upe ni wosu kuni wo myesitamapamu to miaraka pa takasirasamu to kamunagara omoposu nabeni ametuti mo yorite are koso ipabasiru apuminokuni no koromode no tanakamiyama no makwisaku pi no tumade wo mononopuno yaswoudikapa ni tamamo nasu ukabenagasere so wo toru to sawaku mitami mo ipye wasure mwi mo tanasirazu kamozimono midu ni ukiwite wa ga tukuru pinomikadwo ni siranu kuni yosi kosedi ywori wa ga kuni pa tokoyo ni naramu pumi opyeru ayasiki kame mo aratayo to iduminokapa ni motikwoseru makwi no tumade wo momotarazu ikada ni tukuri nobosu ramu iswopaku mireba kamunagara na rasi ")
=N(" unemye no swode pukikapyesu asukakaze miyakwo wo topomi itadurani puku ")

=N(" yasumisisi wa go opokimi takaterasu pinomikwo aratapeno pudiwi ga para ni opomikadwo pazimetamapite paniyasu no tutumi no upe ni aritatasi myesitamapeba yamato no awokaguyama pa pinotate no opomikadwo ni paruyama to simisabwi tateri unebwi no ko no miduyama pa pinoyoko no opomikadwo ni miduyama to yamasabwiimasu miminasi no awosugayama pa sotomo no opomikadwo ni yorosinape kamusabwi tateri nakupasi yosinwonoyama pa kagetomo no opomikadwo yu kumowi ni so topoku arikyeru takasiruya ame no mikage amesiruya pi no mikage no midu kosoba tokosipeni arame miwi no masimidu ")
=N(" pudipara no opomiya tukape aretugu ya wotomye ga tomo pa tomosiki rokamo ")
=N(" koseyama no turaturatubaki turaturani mitutu sinwopana kose no parunwo wo ")
=N(" asamoyosi kwipito tomosi mo matutiyama yukiku to mi ramu kwipito tomosi mo ")
=N(" kapanope no turaturatubaki turaturani miredomo akazu kose no parunwo pa ")
=N(" pikumanwo ni nipopu paripara irimidari koromo nipopase tabi no sirusi ni ")
=N(" iduku ni ka punapate su ramu arenosaki kogitamwi yukisi tana nasi wobune ")
=N(" nagarapuru tuma puku kaze no samuki ywo ni wa ga se no kimi pa pitori ka nu ramu ")
=N(" yopi ni apite asita omo nami nabari ni ka kenagaku imo ga ipori serikyemu ")
=N(" masurawo no satuya tabasami tatimukapi iru matwokata pa miru ni sayakesi ")
=N(" arineyosi tusima no watari watanaka ni nusa torimukete paya kapyerikone ")
=N(" iza kwodomo payaku yamato pye opotomonomitu no pamamatu matikwopwinu ramu ")
=N(" asibye yuku kamo no pagapi ni simo purite samuki yupubye pa yamato si omopoyu ")
=N(" arareutu ararematubara suminoye no otopiwotomye to miredo akanu kamo ")
=N(" opotomo no takasi no pama no matu ga ne wo makuraki nuredo ipye si sinwopayu ")
=N(" tabi nisite mono kwoposiki ni tadugane mo kikoyezu ariseba kwopwite sinamasi ")
=N(" opotomonomitu no pama ni aru wasuregapi ipye ni aru imo wo wasurete omope ya ")
=N(" kusamakura tabi yuku kimi to siramaseba kwisi no panipu ni nipopasamasi wo ")
=N(" yamato ni pa nakite ka ku ramu ywobukwodori kisanonakayama ywobi so kwoyu naru ")
=N(" yamato kwopwi i no nerayenu ni kokoro naku ko no susakimwi ni tadu naku besi ya ")
=N(" tamamo karu oki pye pa kogazi sikitape no makura no atari wasurekanetu mo ")
=N(" wagimokwo wo payami pamakaze yamato n aru wa wo matu tubaki pukazaru na yume ")
=N(" miyosinwo no yama no arasi no samukyeku ni pata ya koyopi mo wa ga pitori nemu ")
=N(" udimayama asakaze samusi tabi nisite koromo kasu beki imo mo aranaku ni ")
=N(" masurawo no tomo no oto su nari mononopuno opomapye tu kimi tate tatu rasi mo ")
=N(" wa go opokimi mono na omoposi sumyekamwi no tugite tamapyeru ware nakyenaku ni ")
=N(" tobutorino asuka no satwo wo okite inaba kimi ga atari pa miyezu ka mo aramu ")
=N(" tobutorino asuka no satwo wo okite inaba kimi ga atari wo mizute ka mo aramu ")

=N(" opokimi no mikoto kasikwomi nikibwinisi ipye wo oki komorikuno patusenokapa ni pune ukete wa ga yuku kapa no kapakuma no yaswokuma otizu yorodutabi kapyerimi situtu tamapokono miti yukikurasi awoniyosi naranomiyakwo no sapogapa ni iyukiitarite wa ga netaru koromo no upe yu asadukuywo sayakani mireba tapenopo ni yworu no simo puri ipatoko to kapa no midu kori samuki ywo wo yasumu koto naku kaywopitutu tukureru ipye ni tiyo madeni kimase opokimi yo ware mo kaywopamu ")
=N(" awoniyosi nara no ipye ni pa yoroduyo ni ware mo kaywopamu wasuru to omopu na ")
=N(" yama no pye no miwi wo migateri kamukazeno isewotomyedomo apimituru kamo ")
=N(" urasaburu kokoro samanesi pisakatano ame no sigure no nagare apu mireba ")
=N(" wata no soko oki tu siranami tatutayama itu ka kwoyenamu imo ga atari mimu ")
=N(" aki saraba ima mo miru goto tumagwopwi ni ka nakamu yama so takanwopara no upe ")
